title: Register of OPG Board members’ interests
body: "OPG maintains a register of board members’ interests.   This list sets out declared interests of non-executive and executive members of the OPG Board as at April 2025.    On appointment, all board members are asked to declare any personal, business, or related party interests that may influence (or be perceived by a reasonable member of the public to influence) their judgments in performing their obligations to the agency.   Board members are also asked to declare any new conflicts of interest before the start of each meeting. "
